title: Craftable Calcite│可合成方解石
description: Added Calcite recipe.│添加了方解石配方。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
Calcite can be crafted by combining Stone and Bone. This is based on the composition of real-world calcite: Calcite is primarily composed of carbon, oxygen, and calcium. Bone, on the other hand, is primarily composed of calcium and, like calcite, is white. Therefore, using Bone to convert Stone into Calcite is a very suitable method.│方解石可以透過石頭 + 骨頭來合成。這是依據現實中方解石的成分所設計的，方解石在現實中主要的成分是碳、氧和鈣，而骨頭的主要成分便是鈣，而且也和方解石一樣是白色的，所以使用骨頭將石頭轉換為方解石再適合不過了。

**※You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"│你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方**
